title: Bridge Essay: Neural representation of emotion regulation goals.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Inner speech, mantra meditation, focused attention, semantic cognition, verbal repetition.

**Neural representation of emotion regulation goals.** — Hum Brain Mapp. PMID: 26537018. DOI: 10.1002/hbm.23053. The use of top-down cognitive control mechanisms to regulate emotional responses as circumstances change is critical for mental and physical health. Several theoretical models of emotion regulation have been postulated; it remains unclear, however, in which brain regions emotion regulation goals (e.g., the downregulation of fear) are represented. Here, we examined the neural mechanisms of regulating emotion using fMRI and identified brain regions representing reappraisal goals. Using amultimeth...
